prompt: implement SplitFields in fields.go following the rules in its doc comment exactly: trim spaces around each field, drop empty fields (trailing commas and runs of commas must never yield blanks), and an empty or whitespace-only input must return an empty but non-nil slice. judge: SplitFields trims, drops empties, and returns a non-nil empty slice for blank input; tests not edited; all tests pass
